Industry detected: product analytics SaaS
Meta description: Self-serve product analytics for B2B SaaS teams.

format_spec: A JSON array of exactly 5 natural-language user query strings. Each must be a realistic prompt a buyer would type into an AI assistant. It must NOT mention the brand name 'Acme Analytics'. No markdown, no explanations.
